system.damage: trample, kick d8+5 (close, forceful), tail sweep d8+5 (reach, area, forceful)
system.moves:
- Bellow loudly
- Smash down or through a barrier
- Reach very, very high up

The Forest Folk would sometimes tell sto- ries of the “tall walkers,” drakes with necks like trees and bodies like small hills, draped in feathers that look like vines and leaves. Supposedly, they roam deep in the forest, blithely chewing leaves from the canopy and singing mournful songs to each other.
